465.name: Tunnel Entrance
465.description: Stairs leading upward crumble to an end upon a short ledge of cracked stone in the darkness. Open air surrounds you, with a slight, dank odor drifting past from the south, through an open passage. From far below rises the sound of a running torrent of liquid. To the north, you can see a crooked gate hangling loosely from its broken hinges.

2304.name: Snowy Clearing
2304.description: A small clearing opens up before you, surrounded by trees heavy with white powder. A blanket of snow covers the ground, with only the occasional bush or tree breaking up the white expanse.

2305.name: Before the Alpine Gates
2305.description: A towering structure made of granite and alpine wood rises before you. Two massive stone columns support a large wooden gate, carved with intricate designs and adorned with wolf pelts. Beyond the gate, you can see the settlement stretching out before you, with sturdy wooden buildings and paths winding their way up the mountain. The air is crisp and fresh, with the sound of eagle calls echoing in the distance.

2311.name: Treacherous Goat Path
2311.description: The ground here is a mix of gravel and packed dirt, marking the beginning of a narrow and treacherous goat path. The low granite wall of the animal pen lies to the west, while the path continues eastward, winding its way through rocky terrain. Mountain slopes rise steeply on both sides, casting shadows over the path and making each step a careful maneuver. Blackened coal seams stain the surrounding rock.

2328.name: Skyrazor's Ascent
2328.description: You find yourself on a narrow, winding path etched into the mountainside. The cold wind whistles through the craggy rocks, and the thin air makes each step a challenge. The path seems to have been used only by the most daring and faithful, hinting at the sacred destination that lies above. A windswept herb clings to the exposed ridge, its leaves crackling with static.

2329.name: Mountain Peak
2329.description: A ridge opens up at the penultimate reaches of the mountain, and the breathtaking view that unfolds before you leaves you in awe. The vast expanse of the land stretches out below, with forests, valleys, and rivers appearing like a grand tapestry. The sky above seems to embrace you, a reminder of the boundless power and majesty of the environment that surrounds you. Above, a massive nest claims the very peak. Fragments of a fallen star are embedded in the surrounding stone.

3632.name: Grassy Clearing
3632.description: The path winds through a verdant clearing where the rocky terrain transitions into an area of lush vegetation. The air is warm and comforting, carrying the invigorating scents of damp earth and thriving plant life. Several wooden totems mark the trail on either side.

3635.name: Nearing the Basin
3635.description: The goat path widens slightly, as the steep inclines of the mountain give way to the more level terrain of the basin. The landscape around you is a mixture of large boulders, clusters of wild grass, and occasional patches of small shrubs. The dark lake in the basin beckons from a short distance, its waters casting a foreboding atmosphere.

3636.name: A Narrow Path
3636.description: A narrow goat's path meets the gentler slopes near the base of the mountain here. The terrain transitions between rocky outcroppings and softer, grassy inclines as it connects the basin below to the challenging mountainside. A dark lake is visible in a basin far below. This location marks a significant change in the landscape, where the path's guidance becomes less necessary for travelers. Hardy succulents cling to the rocky terrain, their thick leaves storing moisture.

3637.name: Rocky Outcropping
3637.description: The goat path takes a sharp turn as it navigates through a rocky outcropping. Boulders of various sizes litter the landscape, creating a challenging obstacle course for those traversing the trail. A shimmering lake is visible from this vantage point, its waters glistening in the distance. The path continues to wind its way through the mountainside, offering little indication of the direction one might be traveling.

3638.name: Narrow Goat Path
3638.description: The narrow goat path zigzags along the mountainside, surrounded by rocky terrain and hardy shrubs that cling to the slopes. Patches of snow and ice make footing treacherous, while the scent of the crisp mountain air fills your nostrils.

3639.name: Treacherous Slope
3639.description: The goat path hugs the steep mountain slope, weaving its way through a maze of jagged rocks and sparse vegetation. The breathtaking view of the surrounding peaks and valleys can be observed from this vantage point, while the path continues to wind around the mountain. Careful footing is essential as loose gravel and small stones threaten to send the unwary traveler tumbling down the mountainside.

3640.name: Winding Mountain Path
3640.description: The goat path narrows and winds its way through the rugged mountain landscape, with craggy rocks and scattered shrubs clinging to the slopes. The terrain requires careful footing as the path continues to the east and west. A chilling mountain wind blows through the area, carrying with it the scent of pine and the faint rustle of leaves.

3654.name: Eagle's Eyrie
3654.description: As the ledge narrows and extends southwest, the mountain's craggy face creates a secluded sanctuary. The space is filled with the sounds of wind rustling through the feathers of the numerous nests and the scent of fresh pine carried on the gusts. From this vantage point, you can observe the breathtaking landscape below, with its snow-capped peaks, evergreens, and distant mountain ranges.

3655.name: Perched Eagle's Ledge
3655.description: This rocky outcropping extends south from the top of the stone staircase. The wind whistles even more loudly here, carrying the scent of pine and frost. The ledge is narrow and precarious, but it offers a unique vantage point over the mountainous terrain. Several large eagle nests made from branches, twigs, and other debris can be found here, tucked securely against the mountainside.

npcs.name: Golden eagle
npcs.description: golden-brown plumage and powerful build. Its strong talons and broad wings allow it to navigate the harsh mountain terrain with ease.

464.name: Narrow Steps
464.description: Here upon narrow steps curving through the earth, the faint sound of a rushing river echoes softly. The tendril roots of ancient trees above reach through the stone surrounding like the bony fingers of the undead searching for a last supper. You can go up or down. r Abandoned Shop As you duck inside to escape yet another cutpurse, broken chairs, crusty cloth, and other trash crunch underfoot. Your eye first catches glints of green: vines poke through the detritus, their tendrils straining for the sparse light coming through a window of fractured glass. An especially nasty putrescence assaults your nostrils from a passageway crudely hacked into the southern wall. To the rear of the structure, steps tumble into darkness.

2297.name: Streamside Trail
2297.description: A narrow path runs along the edge of a rushing stream. The sound of the water is ever-present, echoing off the steep rocky banks. The trail appears to be well-travelled and used frequently.

2298.name: Rocky Outcropping
2298.description: Dark iron streaks run thick through the rock.

2299.name: Forest Clearing
2299.description: A small, grassy clearing surrounded by tall trees greets you. Sunlight filters through the branches, dappling the ground with light and shadow. The air is still and quiet, save for the occasional rustle of leaves from a passing breeze.

2300.name: Steep Hillside
2300.description: The trail begins to climb steeply up the side of a hill. Loose gravel and stones litter the path, making footing treacherous. You have to scramble to keep your balance as you traverse the incline.

2301.name: Mountain Vista
2301.description: You reach the top of the hill and pause to catch your breath. Ahead of you, the land drops away dramatically to reveal a stunning vista of rolling hills and distant mountains. The air is thin and crisp, and the sun is warm on your skin, although a chill wind begins to gust in from the snow-capped mountains.

2302.name: Windy Path
2302.description: The trail winds its way through the forest, with a chill wind blowing down from the nearby mountains. The trees on either side of the path are heavily laden with snow.

2303.name: Snowy Ridge
2303.description: A rocky ridge rises up the the north, its peaks dusted with snow. The path twists and turns its way up the ridge, the trees on either side giving way to more barren rock. Hardy succulents cling to the rocky terrain, their thick leaves storing moisture.
